title: [MMCEGE]Modular Machinery: Community Edition Gui Edit
description: 为你的MMCE控制器Gui区域带来更多的可能Bring more possibilities to your MMCE controller Gui area
body:
目前版本尚不稳定，仍在测试开发，具体使用方法见github：
链接：https://github.com/wu-xiao-ya/Modular-Machinery-Community-Edition-Gui-Edit
The current version is still unstable and under testing and development. For detailed usage instructions, please see GitHub:
Link: https://github.com/wu-xiao-ya/Modular-Machinery-Community-Edition-Gui-Edit

为你的MMCE控制器带来自定义贴图和额外的扩展区域（扩展区域可关）；
为你的工厂控制器线程带来自定义的颜色；
为你的Gui区域带来更多的可能（无需担忧GUI的大小，可以上下滑动，也可以使用右侧扩展区）。
GUI展示效果：
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b15fc322a00bd072945cc64be7129a90d50df66.png)

Add custom textures and extra extended areas to your MMCE controller (extended areas can be turned off);
Add custom colors to your factory controller thread;
This brings more possibilities to your GUI area (no need to worry about the size of the GUI, it can be scrolled up and down, or you can use the right-side expansion area).
GUI display effect:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b15fc322a00bd072945cc64be7129a90d50df66.png)
